name: meow
subtitle: mihomo-based VPN client for iOS
description: A lightweight iOS VPN client powered by mihomo (Clash.Meta). Distributed as an AltStore source for sideloading.

apps.name: meow
apps.subtitle: mihomo-based VPN client
apps.localizedDescription:
meow is a lightweight iOS VPN client built on top of mihomo (Clash.Meta). It supports modern proxy protocols and runs as a Network Extension.

Note: installation requires a paid Apple Developer account because the bundled PacketTunnel extension uses the Network Extension entitlement, which free Apple IDs cannot sign.

versions.localizedDescription:
- Fix instant crash on AltStore / SideStore sideload: app-group identifier is now resolved from the embedded provisioning profile at runtime, so team-prefix rewrites by re-signers no longer hit a hard-coded lookup.
- Previous 1.1.0 changes: Jetsam / memory-growth fix in PacketTunnel (Rust→ObjC rewrite, single tokio worker); on-demand VPN enabled with disconnectOnSleep=false.

- Jetsam / memory-growth fix in PacketTunnel (Rust→ObjC rewrite, single tokio worker)
- On-demand VPN enabled, disconnectOnSleep=false
- Build tooling & logging improvements

Note: this build has a hard-coded app-group identifier and crashes on launch when sideloaded via AltStore / SideStore. Install 1.1.1 or later.

privacy.name: NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Used by the VPN packet tunnel to forward traffic.
